title: Head of Product
notes: James mentioned their team struggles with scattered knowledge across Notion, Confluence, and Google Docs
They have 40+ product people who waste time searching for specs and decisions
Current pain: no single source of truth, decisions get lost in Slack threads
Interested in AI-assisted search and automated meeting notes
Budget not confirmed but James said he can make a case to finance if ROI is clear
Wants to pilot with his team of 8 before rolling out to all 40
painPoints: Meeting notes are inconsistent and not actionable
notionRelevance: Notion AI can unify knowledge base + search
Custom agents can automate meeting notes → action items
Notion's database views can replace their Confluence page tree
